title: The Depths of Impel Down: Rising Conflict
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #10, Unknown person #8, Whitebeard, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #7, Ivankov as the scene develops across pages 5–8.
scene: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Unknown person #10, Unknown person #8, Whitebeard, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #7, focusing on the immediate stakes of the depths of impel down: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: for hours and hours... and hours,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: He stood here and suffered alongside you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Here are your hat and clothes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Or else you won't really recover.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: The paper is still pointing down!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: IVA-CHAN, ARE YOU GOING TO ESCAPE!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: N-Fufu, is that so...? That's pretty cute.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: will certainly impact the world greatly...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Well, whatever. Grandpa said it too.

summary: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Unknown person #10, Unknown person #8, Whitebeard, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #7, focusing on the immediate stakes of the depths of impel down: rising conflict.
